# High Signal

> Daily synthesized brief on technology, startups, and finance — five sections with inline hit-rates, no signup required.

## Product

- [Daily brief](https://highsignal.app/): Primary composed brief
- [Track record](https://highsignal.app/track-record): Public hit-rate ledger
- [Markets](https://highsignal.app/markets): Market signals

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://highsignal.app/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://highsignal.app/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://highsignal.app/llms.txt)


## Lenses & value-add pages

- [Case studies](https://highsignal.app/case-studies): Company universe (~13k)
- [Teardowns](https://highsignal.app/teardowns)
- [Agent eval](https://highsignal.app/agent-eval) + [SEO audit](https://highsignal.app/agent-eval/seo)
- [Methodology](https://highsignal.app/methodology)
- [Track record](https://highsignal.app/track-record)
- [Domains](https://highsignal.app/domains)
- [Explore](https://highsignal.app/explore)
- [Convergence](https://highsignal.app/convergence)
- [Lab](https://highsignal.app/lab)
- [API docs](https://highsignal.app/api-docs)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
